statement.headerDoc:
STEP Batch 2 — 6 classical unsolved problems: finite verifications
  ===================================================================

  Each section contains known small cases + empirical invariants.
  Lean 4 native_decide verifies concrete numeric claims.

  1. Wolstenholme primes  — known only 16843, 2124679
  2. Wilson primes         — known only 5, 13, 563
  3. Waring's problem g(k) — deterministic for k ≤ 471600000
  4. Hilbert-Polya         — spectral perspective (demo only)
  5. Congruent number      — small cases via Tunnell criterion
  6. Pillai's conjecture   — |a^x - b^y| lower

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
